codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - case10_cdc_postgresql","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case10_cdc_postgresql/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"pipe","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(id), '') AS BIGINT) AS ID, NULLIF(TRIM(name), '') AS NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(email), '') AS EMAIL, NULLIF(TRIM(phone), '') AS PHONE, NULLIF(TRIM(address), '') AS ADDRESS, UPPER(NULLIF(TRIM(operation_type), '')) AS OPERATION_TYPE, CURRENT_DATE() AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(operation_type), '') IS NOT NULL"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case10_cdc_postgresql","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case10_cdc_postgresql/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
